promptTemplates.name: saas_multi_tenant
promptTemplates.architecture: Spring Boot REST API with layered architecture
iterationFeatures: Add JWT authentication with organization context
Enforce role-based access control across endpoints
Add audit logging for user and organization actions
Add subscription plan restrictions (feature gating)
Add caching for frequently accessed organization data
Add pagination and filtering across all list endpoints
Add global exception handling
Add API usage tracking per organization
Add rate limiting per tenant
Add structured logging with request correlation IDs
Add soft delete for users and organizations
Add data isolation safeguards between tenants
Add background jobs (e.g. subscription checks)
Add integration tests for key flows
Refactor for scalability and modularity
Add webhook support for organization events
Add data export functionality for tenant data
Add customizable email templates per organization
Add API versioning support
Add organization-level customization settings
